name: Dollhouse | Alt. Scenario Daycare
description: In a future America reshaped by the United States Little Department, U.S.L.D, you reside in an adoption facikity, surrounded by rules that infantilize and cater, awaiting the day you’ll be chosen. Each day is a carefully monitored cycle of obedience lessons, chores, playtime, and punishments until you become the contracted little and wife to your future daddy.
creator: MonicaV
